description: Style Note Say hello to cool comfort in this T-shirt from adidas. The stripes on the shoulder are not just Adidas' logo, they also add a dose of fresh colour and style to the tee. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the tee draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Wear this versatile tee for all your sporting activities or for casual outings. Pair it with jeans or tracks for the wow effect. Product Details Navy blue round neck short sleeved T-shirt, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, Adidas' three stripes in orange appliquéd on the sleeves, printed brand name and logo on the left chest Material and Care 70% cotton and 30% polyester Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
